caption:
Lululemon Align Leggings: Worth the $100? Let's discuss 👖✨

I've owned 3 pairs for 2+ years. Here's my brutally honest review:

Swipe for the full breakdown →

THE GOOD:
✅ Buttery soft (seriously, like nothing else)
✅ No muffin top or digging in
✅ Flattering fit on most body types
✅ Stay opaque (no squat test fails!)
✅ Comfortable for all-day wear

THE BAD:
⚠️ $100+ per pair
⚠️ Pill easily with friction
⚠️ Not great for high-intensity workouts
⚠️ Delicate fabric (no rough surfaces!)

THE VERDICT: Worth it for yoga, lounging, everyday wear. NOT for running or CrossFit.

Cheaper alternatives: CRZ Yoga ($30), Colorfulkoala ($25) - similar feel, less durable.

💙 Save this if you've been debating!

I wanted to share my experience with 𝐋𝐮𝐥𝐮𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧’𝐬 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞, and honestly, I’m pretty impressed.

Lululemon’s Quality Promise is basically their commitment to product quality. If an item was 𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 and doesn’t perform as intended—like 𝐩𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐝𝐞𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐬—they’ll work with you to make it right. You can bring the item into a lululemon store for in-person help, or submit a request online.

I had a Lululemon top that I bought 𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧 𝐚 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐚𝐠𝐨, but recently it started 𝐩𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐚 𝐛𝐢𝐭. At first, I hesitated because activewear naturally goes through wear and tear, but I remembered their Quality Promise and decided to give it a try.

The process was really straightforward:
• I submitted a request online, describing the issue and uploading photos and my receipt
• About 10 days later, Lululemon emailed me a 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧 𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐞𝐥
• I packed up the top and sent it back
• Once they received it, they issued me a 𝐠𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐈 𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐝

No back-and-forth, no arguing—everything was handled 𝐬𝐦𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 👍
Of course, it’s 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐛𝐲 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞, but my experience was very positive.

This really showed me that Lululemon’s “Quality Promise” isn’t just a nice slogan. Given their price point, knowing that they stand behind their products when something doesn’t perform as expected makes me feel much more confident buying from them.

👉 If you have Lululemon items that are 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐚 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐨𝐥𝐝 and are experiencing quality issues (pilling, loose threads, unusual loss of shape, etc.), it’s definitely worth reaching out and requesting support.

THREE THINGS THURSDAY

Here are three of my favorite things! Comment “LINKS” and I’ll send you the links to shop my 3 favorites!

1. “Unreasonable Hospitality: The Remarkable Power of Giving People More Than They Expect” by Will Guidara. When Richie (from “The Bear”) reads a book in the best episode ever (Forks), I read the book! All kidding aside, this book truly is remarkable. Whether you’re a stay at home mom or running a Fortune 500 company, you need to read this one. It’s written from the perspective of the restaurant business, but it can be applied to any industry (or situation for that matter) that you’re in. I honestly can’t recommend it more! I enjoyed reading it so much, and finished it feeling inspired and challenged to give people more than they expect, especially my clients, strangers, and the people in my own home!

2. L’Oreal True Match Lumi Glotion. My mom gave this to my big girls for Easter and I love it so much I had to order my own bottle. It gives you the perfect healthy glow (with or without makeup). I especially love wearing it on the days I don’t wear makeup. I put it on after I apply my sunscreen and it leaves my face looking fresh, natural and glowy. Two thumbs up for this inexpensive drugstore product!

3. Lululemon Power Stride Tab Socks. Loving these socks from Lulu! They’re light weight (a must for me) and the heel tab is slightly higher than my Feetures socks, which I’ve needed lately for tennis. For some reason my Feetures where sliding down in my tennis shoes and causing me to get a blister on my heel. These Lulu socks stay in place, keep my feet nice and cool, and look cute, too (I love the neon colors).

Comment “LINKS” and I’ll send you the links to shop my 3 favorites!

.
.
.
.

caption:
::
THREE THINGS THURSDAY
.
14th Edition 
.
Here are a few of my favorite things!

1. Track That Mid-Rise Lined Short 5”. These Lulu shorts are the PERFECT LENGTH! I have some that are shorter and some that are longer, but I feel so comfortable (and appropriate as a 40 year old) in these! I highly recommend them if you’re in the market for some new athletic shorts for the summer months! 

2. Gripper Chopping Mats. I’ve always been a big fan of the plastic chopping mat versus a heavy wooden cutting board. I like to have multiple on hand when I’m cooking (one for meats, one for veggies, one for fruit), and I love that you can quickly wipe them clean or throw them in the dishwasher. Mine were worn out from years of use, so I recently purchased a new set from Target and I love them! They are sturdy (yet light weight), dishwasher safe (a must), and the gripper side is a game changer for keeping them in place while you’re busy chopping!

3. FASTer Way Cloth Resistance Band. This truly is one of my favorite pieces of equipment in my home gym, and it’s great for travel, too! It really does allow you to take your workout to the next level by increasing muscle resistance and intensity! I’m using it often in my workouts…and definitely FEELING the burn and SEEING the change! 

Products and websites linked in my stories for ya!☺️

This recent purchase is a winner!!! It’s the @lululemon Align Jogger Crop! It’s so soft, so flattering and so SO comfortable. I like having a lulu pant that is different from the traditional leggings because sometimes I don’t feel like wearing skintight leggings but still want the comfort. I find these slim and extremely flattering for a jogger type pant. The pockets are key and don’t bulk out like sometimes pockets do. I have worn these to lounge in, run errands, bike rides, dog walks....well, pretty much everywhere!! FYI..I sized up for a more loose fit. Swipe left to see more details and let us know if you have a must have from Lululemon! Hope everyone has a fantastic Friday and relaxing weekend.

.
I did an up-tempo workout of the following:
10 minutes @ 7:08 pace 
10 minutes @ 6:53 pace 
10 minutes @ 6:40 pace 
This went really well as I ran faster and for longer periods of time than the last two weeks. 🙌🏻
.

caption:
I always thought I was more of a beach lady... but I think I’m meant to be in the mountains. My mind was blown literally every time I looked out of the window of the cabin we were staying in or drove anywhere. ⠀
The mountains are HUGE, and I couldn’t help but feel overwhelmed with amazement and appreciation for this planet. ⠀
⠀
I went on two gorgeous 5-ish mile hikes that were some of my favorite hikes ever and Sam and I spent a day mountain biking at Sundance which will be a highlight of any trip for a long time! ⠀
Yes, I ate it twice and messed myself up (you saw the damage if you watch my stories 🤦‍♀️) but it was soooo worth it and I can’t wait to go back. ⠀
We are already talking about a trip dedicated solely to biking! ⠀
Where are some of your favorite vacation spots in the mountains?! I’m taking ideas and also making a list of where we need to move so I can be in my dream environment 😂😂⠀

caption:
Attract what you expect, reflect what you desire, become who you respect, mirror what you admire.⠀
⠀
I believe that you receive whatever you put out into the universe. If you see the negative in everything first, negativity will continue to infest your day and ultimately your life. ⠀
⠀
Are you in control of your own thoughts or do your thoughts control you? Being able to manage and regulate your mindset is what will get you through this lifetime and ENJOY IT. It doesn’t mean that you won’t ever face struggle or hardships, it just means that you will be able to get through the difficult times and become stronger in the process. ⠀
⠀
What are some ways that you manage your mindset and focus on the positive things in your life?

caption:
루루레몬의 표범 무늬 컬렉션은 양말, 액세서리, 속옷, 운동복, 재킷 등 77개 품목으로 구성되어 있으며, 모든 사람을 위한 제품을 포함하고 있다. 이 컬렉션은 다양한 스타일과 기능성을 제공하여 소비자들의 관심을 끌고 있다. 하버드 출신의 유명 셰프 비지하이 바르하니의 요리책 'Gursha: Timeless Recipes for Modern Kitchens'는 그녀의 독특한 유산을 기념하며, 100개 이상의 레시피를 통해 에티오피아, 이스라엘, 할렘의 문화와 전통을 소개한다. 이 책은 에티오피아 유대인 공동체의 요리 전통을 쉽게 따라 할 수 있도록 전달하고 있다.

제3의 빈은 에콰도르 초콜릿과 콜롬비아 커피로 만든 'Two Bean Bites'를 제공한다. 이 초콜릿은 부드럽고 고운 질감을 자랑하며, 월요일에는 두 개를 먹고 싶어질 정도로 맛있다. 매달 일본의 다양한 음식과 음료를 제공하는 도쿄트리트 스낵 박스는 일본 한정 키트캣 바, 스낵, 과자, 음료 등을 포함한 다양한 품목을 선보인다. 이 박스는 월별로 구독할 수 있으며, 분기별, 반기별 또는 연간 구독 시 할인된 가격으로 제공된다.

멕시코시티에 본사를 둔 Lørdag & Søndag는 다양한 재료로 아름다운 장식품과 기능적인 조각품을 제작한다. 이 회사의 창립자이자 형제인 살바도르와 엔조 콤파냐는 푸에블라에서 손으로 조각한 대리석 조각품을 디자인하였다. 각 작품은 색상, 질감, 자연적인 마킹의 차이로 인해 독특한 매력을 지닌다. 이 조각품은 다른 대리석 종류와 화산암으로도 제공된다. 높이는 약 30.5cm, 너비는 11.4cm이다.

caption:
루루레몬의 표범 무늬 컬렉션은 양말과 액세서리, 다양한 속옷, 운동복, 재킷 등 총 77개의 아이템으로 구성되어 있으며, 모든 사람을 위한 제품을 포함하고 있다. 이 컬렉션은 패션과 기능성을 동시에 갖춘 제품들로, 소비자들에게 큰 인기를 끌고 있다.

하버의 유명 셰프 비지하이 바르하니가 저술한 'Gursha: Timeless Recipes for Modern Kitchens'는 에티오피아, 이스라엘, 할렘 등 그녀의 독특한 유산을 기념하는 요리책이다. 100개 이상의 레시피를 통해 그녀의 베타 이스라엘(에티오피아 유대인) 유산을 음식으로 생생하게 전달하며, 에티오피아, 수단, 이스라엘, 할렘에서의 가족의 경험을 이야기한다. 이 책은 상대적으로 작은 유대인 공동체의 요리 전통을 쉽게 따라 할 수 있는 방식으로 소개하고 있다.

커피와 초콜릿을 동시에 즐길 수 있는 완벽한 간식으로 Third Bean의 Two Bean Bites가 있다. 이 초콜릿은 에콰도르산 초콜릿 원두와 미세하게 갈은 콜롬비아 커피 원두로 만들어지며, 햇볕에 말리고 오크 통에서 숙성된다. 부드러운 식감이 특징이며, 한 개면 충분하지만 월요일에는 두 개를 먹고 싶을 수도 있다.

도쿄트리트 스낵 박스는 매달 일본의 다양한 음식과 음료 아이템을 선보이며, 일본 한정 키트캣 바, 스낵, 제과, 면, 사탕, 칩, 음료 등을 포함한다. 이 박스는 월별로 구독할 수 있으며, 분기별, 반기별 또는 연간 구독 시 할인된 가격으로 제공된다.

CDMX에 본사를 둔 Lørdag & Søndag는 다양한 재료로 아름다운 장식용 물건과 기능적인 조각을 제작한다. 이 회사의 창립자이자 형제인 살바도르와 엔조 콤파냐는 푸에블라에서 수작업으로 조각한 대리석 조각을 디자인하였다. 각 작품은 색상, 질감, 대리석의 자연적인 마킹에 따라 독특하며, 다른 대리석 종류와 화산암으로도 제공된다. 이 조각은 높이 약 30.5cm, 너비 약 11.4cm이다.

Source: coolhunting.com

🔗 POUR RECEVOIR LE LIEN DE MES ACHATS LULULEMON DIRECTEMENT DANS VOS MESSAGES PRIVÉS 👉🏻 ÉCRIVEZ EN COMMENTAIRE LE MOT « SHOP » !

Si vous passez par mon lien pour magasiner, je reçois une petite commission, mais promis ça ne vous coûte absolument rien de plus. Merci tellement de m’encourager et de passer par mes liens ! 🫶🏻

——————-

♥️ Quand j’ai vu ces morceaux sur le site… je n’avais juste pas le choix de commander, tout était trop beau.

Les coupes sont incroyables, les tissus sont tellement confortables et honnêtement ce sont le genre de vêtements que tu mets une fois… et après tu veux les porter non-stop.

Et pour mes Lulu girls, je vous avertis tout de suite… ⚠️ les nouveautés et les grandeurs partent toujours très vite, donc si vous voyez un morceau que vous aimez… n’attendez pas trop !!!

🚨 J’ai inscrit mes grandeurs sur chaque photo dans la légende. Et si vous allez voir dans les commentaires, je vous ai aussi fait des petites vidéos pour vous montrer tous les détails des vêtements !!!

✨ P.S. Dites-moi en commentaire : quel est votre kit préféré ? Je suis curieuse de voir lequel vous aimez le plus ! 🙋🏻‍♀️

caption:
MY FIRST LULELEMON- AM I THE ONLY GUY THAT WEARS THIS ??! So- I’ve always admired the Lululemon brand loyalty and been amazed how much women pay for their stuff! Been told you cant beat the quality. 🙂

Well, my wifey turned my stereotype upside down 🙃 gifting me a Lulu shirt! I was like “They have men’s stuff?! (I is Ignorant I know)

And it turns out she got it gently used somewhere and didn’t pay like 75 bucks for it! Who knew ?! 

Thanks wifey for helping me overcome my stereotypes ! 😊

Im curious if other men wear Lululemon (hope i havent lost my man card) and if anyone else knows where to find their stuff cheap or at least affordable! 😂 

I have seen a few items at my local Goodwill and at Live Thankfully (which we love since sales benefit Immerse), but would welcome any other tips. 

Guess I’m in the club now !!! 🤔🙂

大好きな#カタール航空 🇶🇦

飛行機での移動って昔からワクワクして楽しい時間💞
行きももちろん楽しさ全開だけれど
帰りも寂しさよりも飛行機に乗れた嬉しさが勝ちます✌️✨

色んな#ビジネスクラス があるけどこのカタールのシートがマイブームです💺
羽田発だとJALとの#コードシェア便 で期待がJALなので
ちゃんと成田空港まで行ってます😂😂

登場したらすぐにパジャマに着替えてあとはだいたい寝るか食べるか読書のどれか

もしかしたら飛行機の中ではゆっくりする時間が確約されているから好きなのかもしれない…

.

*Tip for eating out and reaching your goals*⠀
⠀
Instead of thinking of going out to eat as a chance to order whatever you want and treat yourself... think of the treat being that you don’t have to grocery shop, prep, cook or clean the dishes for that meal 🙌🙌🙌⠀
Everything is prepared for you and you get a night off from making your own food, which I know I really appreciate!! So order something that you would eat at home, something with lots of veggies and protein instead of going all out and having a “treat meal”. ⠀
If you’re someone who loves to eat out a lot or travels frequently and is forced to eat at restaurants often... those meals will add up either in a positive or negative way. ⠀
Honestly, it’s about changing your mindset towards it. What’s your approach to eating out? How do you make it work while still reaching your goals? ⠀

caption:
I don’t know about you, but I am looking forward to a new week! We are 7 days into the new year, and I am just now finalizing a new workout split that I’m going to be implementing this week. ⠀
I have indulged in my evening cravings and not followed my intermittent fasting schedule like I wanted to. Some might view that has a failure... right off the bat... starting off the new year *not so strong* 🤷‍♀️🤦‍♀️⠀
This is what I have learned over the last few years though: If you quit after you break a 3 or 4 day streak of working out/eating well, go back to your old habits and then wait around until the next big catalyst to come around and send you off on your health/fitness journey.... progress is going to be incredibly slow. ⠀
Every day, every meal, every workout... is a new opportunity to move in a healthier direction. I encourage you to not go all or nothing. Make those baby steps in the right direction because they add up to huge success over the long term.⠀
⠀
So whether or not you crushed every day so far of the new year, KEEP GOING this week!! Hit the reset button if you fell off track over the weekend. You haven’t failed and you don’t deserve to quit on yourself. YOU FREAKING GOT THIS!⠀
⠀
Who is ready to make progress this week? I would love to hear how your first week was- what went well for you? What do you want to change this week to make your routine more manageable?

Would you return this bag or keep it?

caption:
Handpicked from my lil universe ✨

#lululemon #gymshark #photos #love #lifestyle

Item Details: 👇
• Brand: Lululemon Athletica
• Model: Run: Top Speed Tights
• Authenticity: 100% Authentic with original white size dot and branded metal hardware.
• Size: Lululemon 6 (Fits like a US Small / PH Size 4-6).
• Design: Features a built-in Peacock Blue “Swift” skirt overlay for extra coverage and a curated look.
• Adjustability: Dual side ribbons with signature metal aglets/cubes to cinch and adjust the skirt height.
• Hem Detail: Unique blue ribbon adjusters at the ankle/hem for a customized fit.
• Fabric: High-performance Black Luxtreme (sweat-wicking and four-way stretch) paired with lightweight Swift fabric.
• Safety: Reflective Lululemon logo on the lower leg for visibility during night runs.
• Condition: Good Used Condition . Well kept with all original hardware intact.
Approximate Dimensions (Laid Flat):
• Waist: 27 inches (Total circumference)
• Length: 38 inches

#Lululemon #LululemonTights #LululemonRunning #LululemonTopSpeedTights
#runningtights

Wasn’t expecting myself to jump on the HYROX hype.

Started off just trying to be consistent again. Signed up for ClassPass, found @afterburnkl.fit … and slowly fell in love with the grind.

A few months in, I saw @morph.kl looking for a coach for their new KLGCC outlet — took the leap, went for it.
Grateful to @morph.kl and @arifulmy for the opportunity 🙏

Race day? Honestly, I was stressed. I knew my prep wasn’t perfect. But it was the best I could do while juggling life — husband, father, coach, personal trainer… and just being me.

Training during Ramadhan, especially in the day, isn’t easy — but when there’s no choice, you just make it work.

This journey taught me a lot. Discipline, sacrifice, and showing up even when you don’t feel ready.

And of course… biggest thank you to my wife for holding it down through everything ❤️ @mingisntme #lululemon #thesweatlife #hyrox #hyroxtha

caption:
I rarely purchase @lululemon products for myself these days, not because I don’t LOVE their collection, I DO, but I am constantly spoiling my teenage daughter with gifts from their store. The amount of money we have spent on her over the past decade can be calculated by the obscene collection of mini bags that she has stashed in bins under her bed (shhhhh, don’t tell her dad!). Most of my #Lululemon items (seen in these pics) are all gifts from either my husband or daughter. 
My TRUE love language though, is finding high quality workout pieces that rival that of Lulu. Some may call it dupe, others call it a bargain. I like to call it saving for my daughter’s next #LululemonHaul or #GirlMath 
What do you think? Can you tell the difference between my Lululemon leggings and my Dupes? What about the actual Scuba and the #ScubaDupe ??? 

All the items are being linked in my @shopmy account. If I missed anything, just let me know.
